product_overview: A web-based real-time Werewolf (Mafia) moderator and player app that lets a moderator create and run games while players join via room code; uses Socket.io for live phase management and supports Thai/English localization. Includes optional authentication for user stats and per-role win/loss tracking.
core_goals: Provide an easy lobby flow for moderators to create rooms, configure roles, and start games.
Allow players to join rooms by code and participate in private role reveal, night actions, and day voting.
Offer a moderator dashboard to control phase transitions, view role assignments, and resolve night/day results in real time.
Support user authentication and persistent stats for players (profile with per-role breakdown).
Keep the UI localized (Thai/English) and optimized for mobile with press-and-hold role reveal interactions.

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Landing page that routes users to create or join rooms and provides access to login/profile and language toggle.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Create Room button to go to /create -> See Create Room page
Navigate to / -> Click Join Room button to go to /join -> See Join Room page
Navigate to / -> Click Login button (if not logged in) to go to /login -> See Login page
Navigate to / -> Click username button (if logged in) to go to /profile -> See Profile page
Navigate to / -> Toggle language between Thai and English -> See UI language update
Navigate to / -> Click Create Room button to go to /create -> Click copy button to copy room code -> See clipboard permission denied error

features.name: User Login and Registration
features.description: Authenticate users via username/password or Google OAuth; allows registration and shows errors on invalid credentials.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit credentials -> See username button in header

Navigate to /login -> Click toggle to switch to Register mode -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Register button to create a new account -> See username button in header
Navigate to /login -> Click Google Sign-In button for OAuth login -> See OAuth popup and complete sign-in -> See username button in header
Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit credentials -> See error message on invalid credentials
Navigate to /login -> Click Google Sign-In button for OAuth login -> See Google Sign-In button not rendered or OAuth blocked due to missing GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID

features.name: Create Room (Lobby)
features.description: Moderator creates a room, receives an auto-generated room code, sets role counts, waits for players, then starts the game when configuration matches player count.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> See auto-generated room code displayed on screen -> Click copy button to copy room code to clipboard -> See clipboard copy success

Navigate to /create -> See auto-generated room code displayed on screen -> See list of players as they join -> Adjust role counts (Werewolf, Seer, Bodyguard, Villager) using +/- buttons -> See total role count match player count and at least 4 players -> Click Start Game button -> See redirect to /moderator/:roomCode

Navigate to /create -> Adjust role counts using +/- buttons so total role count does not match player count -> Click Start Game button -> See error message that Start Game is disabled until role count equals player count and minimum players reached
Navigate to /create -> Click copy button to copy room code to clipboard -> See clipboard permission denied error

features.name: Join Room
features.description: Player enters a 4-digit room code and a display name to join a moderator-created game room and be routed to the player view.
user_flows: Navigate to /join -> Enter 4-digit room code in numeric input field -> Enter player name up to 20 characters -> Click Join button to join the room -> See redirect to /play/:roomCode
Navigate to /join -> Enter 4-digit room code in numeric input field -> Enter player name up to 20 characters -> Click Join button to join the room -> See error message if room not found

Navigate to /join -> Enter 4-digit room code in numeric input field -> Enter player name up to 20 characters -> Click Join button to join the room -> See error message if game already started and joining is blocked
Navigate to /join -> Click back button to return to / -> See Home page

features.name: Moderator Dashboard
features.description: Moderator view to observe all players and roles, control night/day phases, resolve actions, and end or restart games in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> See all players with their assigned roles -> Click Start Night button to begin night phase -> See night sub-phase progression (werewolf, bodyguard, seer)
Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> Click Start Night button -> Wait for night actions -> Click Resolve Night button to apply night actions -> See night result announcement

Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> After Resolve Night -> Click Start Day button to begin day voting -> See day vote results -> Click Resolve Day button to eliminate voted player -> See eliminated player removed from live list
Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> See game over screen when win condition is met -> Click Play Again to restart the game -> See new lobby or restarted game state
Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> Click Resolve Night button before night actions are submitted -> See error message that resolution cannot proceed until actions are submitted
Navigate to /moderator/:roomCode -> Lose WebSocket connection -> See disconnected warning and inability to advance phases until connection resumes

features.name: Player View
features.description: Player-facing interface where a player privately reveals their role via press-and-hold, performs night actions (if any), and participates in day voting; shows alive/eliminated state and final win/lose result.
user_flows: Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Press and hold role card to reveal assigned role -> See role revealed while hold progress completes

Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Press and hold role card to reveal assigned role -> See night action prompt based on role (werewolf vote, seer investigate, bodyguard protect) -> Submit night action target selection -> See seer investigation result (if seer)
Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Participate in day vote by selecting a player to eliminate -> Click Submit Vote -> See vote confirmation and later see day vote results
Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> See game result win/lose at end of game -> See eliminated/alive status displayed
Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Press and hold role card but release before hold duration -> See role not revealed and hold progress reset
Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Try to submit night action while marked eliminated -> See action disabled and error if attempted
Navigate to /play/:roomCode -> Lose WebSocket connection during night or day -> See inability to submit actions and a disconnected warning

features.name: User Profile and Stats
features.description: Authenticated user page that displays overall and per-role statistics, with logout and navigation options.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> See total games played, wins, losses, and win rate -> See per-role stats (games played, wins, losses, win bar)
Navigate to /profile -> Click Logout button to sign out -> See redirect to /login or logged out header
Navigate to /profile -> Click back button to return to / -> See Home page
Navigate to /profile -> Toggle language between Thai and English -> See UI language update
Navigate to /profile while not authenticated -> See redirect to /login or login prompt
Navigate to /profile -> API GET /api/me/stats fails -> See error message indicating stats could not be loaded

Player enters room code and name to join a game room
Moderator dashboard showing all player roles and game phase controls
Player interface for role peek, night actions, and day voting
Login or register with username/password or Google OAuth
Authenticated user stats and per-role win/loss breakdown

known_limitations.issue: Player and Moderator views rely entirely on WebSocket (Socket.io) events, not REST API calls — tests requiring direct HTTP interaction with game state will not work
known_limitations.impact: Game phase transitions and night/day actions cannot be tested via HTTP; requires WebSocket simulation

known_limitations.issue: Role reveal uses press-and-hold interaction which may not be easily testable with standard click events
known_limitations.impact: Role reveal testing may need long-press simulation

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth login requires external GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID env variable and may not be available in test environment
known_limitations.impact: Google Sign-In button may not render or function during automated testing
